name: Toerbroers: Jou Toekoms
overview: Andries and Wiaan take 45 students, called joggies, under their wing and show them what a career in nature conservation and tourism is like. This group is quickly whittled down to 25, 15 and a top ten, after which someone is voted out each episode. However, all 45 can still be seen throughout the series - even the ones who dropped out.

trailers.title: Amptelike voorskou – Toerbroers: Jou toekoms | S1 | Ep 0 | kykNET
